# Trailer Dr.

> Trailer Dr. is a portable, one-person electrical and air brake trailer diagnostic tool for fleets, repair shops, and mobile service operators across the USA. Built and designed in Fort Kent, Maine by Bruce Theriault, a 30-year trucking and forestry industry veteran. One technician can test trailer lights, air supply, and brake activation from the rear of the trailer — no second person in the cab required.

## Product

- [Buy Trailer Dr.](https://www.thetrailerdr.com/product): Purchase page with pricing ($3,195), full specifications, and order options.
- [Features & Specs](https://www.thetrailerdr.com/features): Complete technical specifications — 30A output, 15.2 lbs, waterproof NEMA-rated enclosure, air output, and full compatibility details.

## Company

- [About](https://www.thetrailerdr.com/about): The story behind Trailer Dr., founder background, and the problem it solves for the trucking industry.
- [Contact](https://www.thetrailerdr.com/contact): Reach the team directly to schedule a demo, ask questions, or get support. Phone: (207) 231-4967. Email: bruce.trailerdr@gmail.com.

## Key facts

- Price: $3,195 USD with free shipping to the contiguous USA
- Weight: 15.2 lbs
- Output: 30A electrical, air brake activation
- Enclosure: Waterproof NEMA-rated
- Warranty: 1 year
- Made in: Fort Kent, Maine, USA
- Designed for: Semi-trailers, fleet maintenance, roadside service, repair shops
